active_profile.supports_platform_auth: build gated by QL_BUILD_ONLINE_SERVICES / platform service support

oob_scalar_primitives.source_write_mode: MSG_WriteBits writes raw 8/16/32-bit little-endian values while msg->oob is true
oob_scalar_primitives.source_read_mode: MSG_ReadBits reads raw 8/16/32-bit little-endian values while msg->oob is true
oob_scalar_primitives.retail_write_anchor: MSG_WriteBits 0x004D4AF0 branches on msg->oob and writes byte/word/dword data directly
oob_scalar_primitives.retail_read_anchor: MSG_ReadBits 0x004D4C70 branches on msg->oob and reads byte/word/dword data directly

compatibility_matrix.payload_shape: getchallenge, space, little-endian SteamID low word, little-endian SteamID high word, auth ticket bytes
compatibility_matrix.policy: build gated by platform auth support; no live service required for this static compatibility matrix
compatibility_matrix.negative_test: CL_SendChallengeRequest must send the built Steam challenge buffer through NET_OutOfBandRaw, not NET_OutOfBandData
Only the connect request path may reach NET_OutOfBandData
The retail profile must keep legacy authorize disabled and raw if explicitly enabled by another profile

negative_assertions.assertion: MSG_WriteBits and MSG_ReadBits contain raw OOB branches and only use Huffman helpers in the non-OOB branch
NET_OutOfBandPrint writes four 0xff bytes, formats at offset 4, and sends without Huff_Compress
NET_OutOfBandRaw writes four 0xff bytes, copies raw payload at offset 4, and sends without Huff_Compress
CL_SendChallengeRequest uses NET_OutOfBandRaw for the Steam getchallenge payload and NET_OutOfBandPrint for fallback
SV_ConnectionlessPacket only calls Huff_Decompress(msg, 12) after NET_IsConnectRequestPacket identifies the clear connect token

retail_anchors.observed: OOB branch writes direct 8/16/32-bit values; Huffman helpers are in the non-OOB branch.
OOB branch reads direct 8/16/32-bit values; Huffman helpers are in the non-OOB branch.
Resets read counters and sets the OOB flag.
Initializes msg_t storage and sets the OOB flag.
Retail connectionless server path calls this with offset 0x0c only for connect packets.
Retail NET_OutOfBandData calls this with offset 0x0c.
Connect request path reaches NET_OutOfBandData; Steam getchallenge path sends a raw OOB buffer.
Writes four 0xff bytes and sends raw formatted bytes.
Writes four 0xff bytes, copies payload, compresses from offset 0x0c, then sends.
Checks for the clear connect token at offset 4 and calls Huff_Decompress with offset 0x0c before tokenizing.

completion_status.implementation_plan_entry: Audit OOB/connect/auth behavior and confirm whether any retail path applies compression beyond raw OOB primitives
remaining_gaps: No committed retail packet capture is available for byte-for-byte compressed connect comparison.
Live Steam platform auth remains a documented online-service divergence unless QL_BUILD_ONLINE_SERVICES is enabled.
